ISessionAuthOption Interface

One Identity Manager API Server
Represents information about an authentication option.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Session
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public interface ISessionAuthOption

The ISessionAuthOption type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
AdditionalAuthProps
AuthModuleName
Id
Returns the identifier of this authentication option. This identifier must be unique across all available authentication modules and options.
Product
ShowInInterface
ThrowOnFailure
If this flag is set, an exception during an authentication attempt will be thrown also for FixedCredentials and single-sign-on authentications, instead of continuing trying with the next authentication provider.
Top
Methods
  NameDescription
Authenticate
Authenticates the connection using the supplied authentication properties.
GetAuthModuleAsync
Returns the authentication module, or null if it is not enabled.
TryGetAuthModuleInfoAsync
Top
Remarks
An authentication option exposes an authentication module in a reconfigurable way. Its display name can be configured, and authentication properties can be hidden or set to a pre-defined value.
